parameters.query: SELECT stage, COUNT(*) AS deal_count, SUM(amount) AS total_value, AVG(amount) AS avg_deal_size, SUM(amount * COALESCE(probability, 50) / 100.0) AS weighted_value FROM zoho_deals WHERE stage NOT IN ('Closed Won', 'Closed Lost') GROUP BY stage ORDER BY stage;

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN stage = 'Closed Won' THEN amount END), 0) AS won, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN stage = 'Closed Lost' THEN amount END), 0) AS lost, COUNT(CASE WHEN stage = 'Closed Won' THEN 1 END) AS won_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN stage = 'Closed Lost' THEN 1 END) AS lost_count FROM zoho_deals WHERE modified_in_zoho >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE);

INSERT INTO pipeline_forecast (period_type, period_label, pipeline_total, weighted_pipeline, won_to_date, lost_to_date, deal_count, avg_deal_size, conversion_rate) VALUES ('{{$json.period_type}}', '{{$json.period_label}}', {{$json.pipeline_total}}, {{$json.weighted_pipeline}}, {{$json.won_to_date}}, {{$json.lost_to_date}}, {{$json.deal_count}}, {{$json.avg_deal_size}}, {{$json.conversion_rate}});

meta.description: Monday 6 AM — calculates weekly pipeline forecast from zoho_deals, stores in pipeline_forecast table.
